title: The Aftermath of Egghead
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Bonney, Vegapunk, Saturn as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course he wants to act!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're Sitting on some juicy scoops!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stoke their fears! Paint a picture of the bleakest future possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use their desperation to push more WeJ Papers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's gross... even vegapunk showed some optimism...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll expose you if you don't zip it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's Wrong with you, you overgrown squawking liar?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one with a brain will dance to your tune...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, viv-chan... we don't want to upset the fine gentlemen and lose our only safe haven now, do we? ♤

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't pass this up! Even the truth is captivating now! The whole world's Sinkin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KUWA ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm top dog up in the sky anyway, so this upcoming era is perfect for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope you won't come to regret talking back to me, Princess.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the world is ending anyway, I'm not going to grovel just to save my own neck.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just look at all the stories we've got to pick from!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why are you the one pickin' up...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: What's goin' on with Saint Saturn?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he safe? What about the power stationz did any of the targets escape?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
